author: pzydron
name: 12L dim=448 LeakyReLU² BGVOCAB=2048 — GH200 MIG proxy
blurb: Proxy-scale submission (GH200 MIG 1g.24gb, 5k steps). 12-layer 448-dim GQA+XSA transformer with MLP×3, Bigram-2048+1024dim bypass, LeakyReLU² (slope=0.1), EMA=0.995, Optuna v1 TPE hyperparams. val_bpb=1.23263493 (int6+zstd-22, stride=64, 15.58MB). Not a SOTA record — proxy hardware. Requesting H100 access for full competition run.
technique_summary: 12-layer 448-dim GQA+XSA, MLP×3, Bigram-2048+1024dim, LeakyReLU², EMA=0.995, int6+zstd-22
